projects.description: I am in charge of migrating and developing from scratch a new web platform with Angular 19, Tailwind CSS, and PrimeNG. I build reusable components with a focus on UX and scalable architecture. Technologies: Angular 19 Tailwind CSS PrimeNG TypeScript RxJS Git

I migrated legacy applications to Angular 14, working on improving user experience and optimizing internal processes in an enterprise environment. Technologies: Angular 14 TypeScript RxJS SOLID Clean Code Git

I designed and developed the architecture of 'Gravity' from scratch, an application for visualizing global client positions, using Angular 14. Technologies: Angular 14 TypeScript RxJS SPA Architecture Git

I developed the insurer's digital channel with Angular 9, performing functional analysis and building a robust and reliable user portal. Technologies: Angular 9 TypeScript RxJS Functional Analysis Git

I created and managed a personal project for the dissemination of the history and cultural heritage of Madrid. I was in charge of the entire digital ecosystem: web development, SEO, content strategy, performance optimization, security, and UX. I managed to generate organic traffic and monetize the site. Technologies: SEO Web Development Content Strategy UX/UI

I was responsible for the migration of critical banking data during the integration of Banco Popular, taking care of the extraction, transformation, and loading of financial information. Technologies: COBOL DB2 Data Migration

I developed and maintained core banking systems in the areas of risk, investment funds, and regulatory compliance. I implemented batch processes and performed evolutionary maintenance tasks for over 14 years in critical environments. Technologies: COBOL CICS DB2 PL/SQL Batch Git

First professional contact with client-server environment development. I participated in the migration and adaptation of an accounting management solution for SMEs, working on accounting module maintenance and functional validation. Technologies: Visual Basic 6 Data Migration
